info.name: SchoolFinder Egypt API
info.description:
Complete API collection for SchoolFinder Egypt.

**How to use:**
1. Set `base_url` variable to your server URL
2. Run **Login (User)** or **Login (Admin)** — token is saved automatically
3. All protected endpoints use the token automatically

**Variables:**
- `base_url` → http://localhost:8000/api
- `token` → auto-set after login
- `admin_token` → auto-set after admin login

request.description: Login as a parent/user. Token is automatically saved to collection variable.
Login as admin. Admin token is automatically saved separately.
Get the currently authenticated user's data.

Get paginated list of schools.

**Query params:**
- search: school name or area
- type: British / American / German / French / International / Canadian / Montessori / IB World
- curriculum: IGCSE / IB Diploma / American Diploma / Abitur / French Baccalaureate / A-Levels
- location: area name (Maadi, New Cairo, Sheikh Zayed, etc)
- fee_min / fee_max: integer in EGP
- sort: name / fee_low / fee_high / rating
- per_page: max 50
Get full detail of a single school including location, fees, curricula.
Compare up to 3 schools side by side.
Check if the current user can review this school (needs confirmed appointment).

Book a school visit appointment.

- school_id: required
- preferred_date: required (YYYY-MM-DD, must be future date)
- message: optional
User can only cancel their own PENDING appointments.

item.name: 🛠️ Admin
item.description: All admin endpoints. Run 'Login (Admin)' first — token is saved automatically.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "New Test International School",
  "type_id": 1,
  "email": "info@testschool.com",
  "phone": "+202 1234 5678",
  "website": "https://testschool.com",
  "age_min": 3,
  "age_max": 18,
  "class_size_avg": 20,
  "transport": "Available",
  "location": {
    "area": "New Cairo",
    "city": "Cairo",
    "compound": null,
    "address": "New Cairo, Egypt"
  },
  "curricula": [1, 2],
  "fee": {
    "tuition_min": 100000,
    "tuition_max": 200000,
    "currency": "EGP",
    "academic_year": "2025/2026"
  }
}

{
  "target": "specific",

  "title": "Your appointment is confirmed!",
  "body": "Your visit to BISC has been confirmed for April 25, 2026 at 10:00 AM.",
  "type": "appointment"
}

Login + auto-save token + test response shape.
